title: Eschweilera melinonis
taxonomy: Eschweilera melinonis is classified within the family Lecythidaceae, commonly known as the Brazil nut family. This family consists of around 30 genera, with Eschweilera being one of them. Eschweilera melinonis is a species of flowering plant native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions. The plant belongs to the order Ericales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Eschweilera melinonis is further classified as a member of the genus Eschweilera, which includes over 100 species.
